page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDCI775 or TLPL790.

Formerly: EDCI775.

TLPL791 Qualitative Research |: Design and Fieldwork (3 Credits) Examines the theoretical and epistemological moorings of different types of qualitative research. Students apply selected field research methods to problems of professional practice in schools and communities while considering central issues and dilemmas that arise while engaging in fieldwork.
